title: package:hooks_runner party:shared shared definitions
$comment: This schema specifies the private hooks_runner metadata for compilation target and caching boundaries.

HooksRunnerConfig.description: Private caching target metadata for the hooks runner.

RecordUseConfig.description: Target compilation metadata governing the recorded usages (package:record_use) cache boundary.

entry_points.description: The absolute or relative entry point file paths.

compiler.description: The compiler version and target compiler options governing distinct cache boundaries.
